description_long: This is a large, modern sniper or anti-materiel rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a robust, angular receiver. The rifle features a bipod mounted near the muzzle for stability during firing, and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The stock is solid and blocky, designed for shoulder support, and the magazine is a large, detachable box type, likely for high-caliber rounds. The top of the receiver has a mounting rail, but no optical sight is currently attached, only a basic iron sight is visible. The overall finish is matte black and dark gray, giving it a tactical, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or military environments.
description: A large, heavy-barreled sniper or anti-materiel rifle with a bipod, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte black and gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, bipod extended, and the large detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the bipod stance and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, pistol grip, and the magazine from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the spread of the bipod legs.
